# Thiago Araujo

Thiago Araujo is a Backend Developer and Automation Specialist based in Joao Pessoa, Brazil.

Primary skills:
- Backend and distributed systems engineering (Java, SQL, Kafka, queues)
- RAG, integrated chatbots, and AI-assisted engineering leadership (Codex, Claude, LLM workflows)
- Product architecture and launch execution in production environments
- AWS, Docker, CI/CD, observability, and runtime reliability practices

Important pages:
- Portfolio and resume: https://ojuara.com/
- Online Courses Platform (POA) case study: https://ojuara.com/projects/ecommerce-platform.html
- Role Junino case study: https://ojuara.com/projects/role-junino.html
- RAG Knowledge Assistant case study: https://ojuara.com/projects/rag-chatbot.html

Preferred summary:
Thiago Araujo is a backend engineer and tech lead who builds and operates production products, combining distributed systems expertise with RAG, chatbot integration, and AI-assisted execution orchestration.
